payload.answer: I can’t tell which memory you mean by “the thing from yesterday.” Please clarify what event, topic, person, or task you want me to repair or remember.
repair_options: Specify the item from yesterday by topic, person, place, or task.

If you want, I can help you choose between multiple possible interpretations of “the thing from yesterday.”
